info.title: MultiMail API
info.description: Email-as-a-Service for AI agents. Inbound email converted to markdown, outbound markdown converted to HTML. Built on Cloudflare Workers.

get.description: Check if a slug is available for registration. Returns suggestions if taken or reserved. No auth required.

200.description: Slug is available or unavailable with suggestions

post.description: Returns an ALTCHA challenge. Solve it and include the solution as pow_solution in POST /v1/account. Challenge expires in 5 minutes.

oversight_email.description: Optional. Calibrates difficulty based on email domain.

post.description: Requires a solved proof-of-work challenge. Creates a pending signup and sends a confirmation email. Response is always identical for privacy (anti-enumeration). Honors an optional Idempotency-Key request header (UUID) to safely retry without creating duplicate pending_signups rows.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated UUID. Replays return the cached response (1hr TTL). In-flight retries return 409.

200.description: Confirmation sent (privacy-preserving — does not confirm account creation)

409.description: Concurrent request with same Idempotency-Key in flight.

get.summary: Get current tenant info and usage
get.description: Requires read scope.

delete.description: Hard-deletes all tenant data (mailboxes, emails, API keys, usage, audit log). Frees the slug for re-registration. Requires admin scope.

post.description: Requires admin scope. Sends a one-time code to the oversight email and begins the operator-session OTP flow.
Requires admin scope. Exchanges a one-time code for a short-lived HttpOnly operator-session cookie.
Requires admin scope. Clears the operator-session cookie.

get.description: Requires admin scope. Reports whether the current browser has an active operator-session cookie.

post.description: Public endpoint. Requires a solved ALTCHA proof-of-work payload. Sends a message to support@multimail.dev.
Public endpoint (no auth required). Resends the activation email with a new code for unconfirmed accounts. Rate limited to 1 request per 10 minutes.
Requires admin scope. Address can be a local part (appended to tenant subdomain) or full address on a verified custom domain.

403.description: Plan mailbox limit reached or wrong scope

get.description: Requires read scope.

patch.description: Requires admin scope. Oversight mode can only be downgraded here; upgrades require the upgrade flow.

get.description: Requires read scope. Returns paginated email summaries (no body content).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor (received_at epoch from previous page)

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Return emails newer than this ID

get.description: Requires read scope. Without a status filter, returns spam_flagged and spam_quarantined emails across all tenant mailboxes.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor (received_at epoch from previous page)

post.description: Requires send scope. Moves the email to spam_quarantined and records a user spam label.

post.summary: Mark an email as not spam
post.description: Requires send scope. Restores the email to unread and records a user not_spam label.

get.summary: Get full email with markdown body and attachment metadata
get.description: Requires read scope. Automatically marks unread emails as read.
Requires read scope. Returns base64 inline for small files (<50KB) or a presigned URL for larger files.

post.description: Cancels an email in pending_send_approval or pending_inbound_approval status. Idempotent if already cancelled. Requires send scope.

409.description: Email not in a cancellable state

put.description: Replaces all tags with the provided key-value pairs. Requires send scope.

get.description: Requires read scope.
Returns thread metadata and all emails in the thread (without body content). Requires read scope.

404.description: Thread not found or no emails

post.summary: Send email (provide markdown, we convert to HTML)
post.description: Requires send scope.

202.description: Email queued for scanning and delivery

post.summary: Reply to an email in thread
post.description: Requires send scope. Supports attachments and idempotency keys.
Add a contact to the address book. Requires send scope.

get.description: Search address book by name or email. Omit query to list all. Requires read scope.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by name or email (partial match)

get.description: Requires oversight scope.

post.summary: Approve or reject a pending email
post.description: Requires oversight scope. Approved outbound emails are sent immediately.
Subscribe to email events. Returns the signing secret (shown only on creation). Requires admin scope.

mailbox_id.description: Optional: scope to a specific mailbox

get.description: Requires admin scope. Signing secrets are not included in the list.
Includes signing secret. Requires admin scope.

post.description: Receives inbound emails from Postmark. Authenticated via HTTP Basic Auth with the Postmark webhook secret. Not a consumer API endpoint.
Requires send scope. Emails a one-time upgrade code to the operator. Rate-limited to 3 requests per hour per mailbox.

400.description: Invalid target_mode or already in that mode

post.summary: Redeem an upgrade code to change oversight mode
post.description: Requires send scope. Codes are single-use and expire after 24 hours.

get.summary: List API keys (never shows full key)
get.description: Requires admin scope. Returns key prefix, scopes, and metadata.

post.description: Requires admin scope. The raw key is returned only once in the response.

patch.summary: Update API key name or scopes

delete.description: Requires admin scope. Returns 202 with pending_approval on first call; resend with approval_code to complete.

approval_code.description: Operator approval code (from email). Omit on first call to request approval.

202.description: Approval requested — check oversight email for code

404.description: Key not found or no pending approval

post.summary: Create a Stripe checkout session for plan upgrade
post.description: Requires admin scope.

post.summary: Create a Coinbase Commerce checkout (crypto payment)
post.description: Requires admin scope. One-time charge.

post.summary: Create account + Stripe checkout in one step (public, no auth)
post.description: Creates an inactive tenant, provisions a default mailbox, and returns a Stripe checkout URL. After payment, call GET /v1/billing/session-key to retrieve the API key. Honors an optional Idempotency-Key request header (UUID); the same key is forwarded to Stripe so duplicate Sessions are not created on retry.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated UUID. Cached for 1hr in our KV; also forwarded to Stripe (24hr server-side dedupe window).

409.description: Operator name taken or concurrent Idempotency-Key in flight

get.summary: Retrieve one-time API key after pricing-page checkout
get.description: Public endpoint. Returns the API key stored during pricing-checkout, then deletes it. Key expires after 1 hour if not retrieved.

post.description: Pricing page beacon hit via navigator.sendBeacon to track open/submit/error events on the signup modal. Fire-and-forget; counters are best-effort (KV is non-atomic). IP-rate-limited to 30 req/min.

post.summary: Cancel subscription at end of billing period
post.description: Requires admin scope. Sets cancel_at_period_end on the Stripe subscription so the tenant retains access until the current billing period ends.

post.summary: Create a Stripe customer portal session
post.description: Requires admin scope. Returns a URL to the Stripe-hosted billing portal for self-service invoice, payment method, and plan management.

get.summary: Redirect to frontend confirmation page at multimail.dev/confirm

post.description: JSON response includes: status, name, oversight_mode, api_key, mailbox_id, mailbox_address, oversight_email, use_case. Browser form submissions redirect to /welcome.

get.summary: Redirect to frontend confirmation page with code prefilled

post.description: Requires admin scope.

201.description: Domain created with DNS records to configure

get.description: Requires admin scope.
Requires admin scope.

post.summary: Trigger DNS verification for a custom domain
post.description: Requires admin scope.

get.description: Returns audit log entries with cursor pagination. Requires admin scope.
Returns addresses suppressed due to bounces, spam complaints, or manual unsubscribes. Requires admin scope.

delete.summary: Remove an address from the suppression list
delete.description: Allows future emails to be sent to this address again. Requires admin scope.

404.description: Address not found in suppression list

get.description: Returns recent webhook delivery attempts. Requires admin scope.
Requires read scope. Returns usage counts for the current billing period.

get.summary: Public signing key for identity verification
get.description: Returns the ECDSA P-256 public key used to sign X-MultiMail-Identity headers.

get.summary: Look up agent mailbox reputation by hash
get.description: Rate-limited to 10 lookups per IP per hour.
Requires admin scope. Rate limited to 1 request per hour.

get.summary: Render hosted approval page for oversight decisions

post.summary: Generate a new API key for a tenant (admin key recovery)
post.description: Admin-only. Creates a new API key and emails it to the tenant's oversight email. Used when welcome email failed or KV expired before key retrieval.

get.description: Verifies D1 and R2 connectivity. No auth required.

bearerAuth.description: API key (mm_live_...). Keys have scopes: read (list/read emails, mailboxes, contacts), send (send/reply/cancel emails), admin (manage mailboxes, API keys, billing, account), oversight (approve/reject pending emails).

operator_name.description: Company or individual name. Included in identity headers and signature block.

payment_method.description: Signup intent source. Pricing page starter flow sends stripe.

slug.description: URL-safe slug. Auto-generated from operator_name if omitted.

oversight_mode.description: Optional initial mailbox oversight mode. Unsafe modes are rejected.

cf_challenge_response.description: Preferred browser Turnstile token field. Mirrors the hidden cf-turnstile-response input value. maxLength keeps API Shield's auto-learned body-size cap above the ~1.6KB Turnstile token (see lesson #18).

turnstile_token.description: Legacy Turnstile token field. Accepted for backward compatibility. maxLength matches cf_challenge_response — see lesson #18.

fingerprint.description: Optional browser fingerprint used for signup throttling.

form_open_at.description: Epoch milliseconds when the signup modal opened.

pow_solution.description: Solved ALTCHA proof-of-work challenge from POST /v1/account/challenge.

challenge.description: Challenge hash from the challenge endpoint

number.description: Solved number N where SHA-256(salt + N) matches challenge

salt.description: Salt from the challenge (echo back unchanged)

signature.description: Signature from the challenge (echo back unchanged)

AttributionPayload.description: Optional client-captured conversion attribution (Phase 2 of plan 2026-04-27-003). The browser persists this in localStorage.mm_attribution_v1 and forwards it on signup. Server-side validator at src/lib/attribution.ts is the source of truth — bad shapes are silently dropped, NEVER reject the signup. additionalProperties:false on this object AND its sub-objects keeps the API Shield body-size cap honest even if the per-operation mitigation pin in scripts/sync-api-shield.sh is ever undone: an attacker cannot pad the body with arbitrary unknown keys to bypass the per-field maxLengths (adversary review iter1 finding ATTR-1).

visits.description: Visit counter, incremented client-side. Server validator coerces missing/zero/negative values to 1.

version.description: Schema version. Only 1 is currently accepted; future bumps will rotate the localStorage key client-side and add new branches server-side.

AttributionVisit.description: A single landing event — first or last touch.

landing_path.description: Pathname of the landing page (no host).

params.description: Tracked URL params present on the landing page. All keys optional; unknown keys are dropped server-side. additionalProperties:false enforces the allowlist at the schema layer too (adversary review iter1 ATTR-1).

SignupResponse.description: Always returns the same response for privacy (anti-enumeration). Does not confirm whether the account was actually created.

message.example: Check your email for the activation code.

address_local.description: Local part (e.g. 'inbox') or full address on custom domain (e.g. 'inbox@custom.com')

oversight_mode.description: Ignored — new mailboxes always start at gated_send. Use the upgrade flow to change.
Downgrade only. To upgrade, use POST /v1/mailboxes/{id}/request-upgrade.

markdown.description: Email body in markdown. Converted to HTML.

idempotency_key.description: Dedup key (24h TTL). If resent within TTL, returns the original email ID.

send_at.description: Schedule delivery for a future time. ISO 8601 UTC (must end with Z). Example: 2026-03-15T14:00:00Z

gate_timing.description: Override mailbox default: gate_first approves before scheduling, schedule_first schedules then approves on delivery
